checks.name: node --test
checks.evidence: 14 tests passed, including Cranfield corpus parsing, qrel joining, OpenSearch bulk payload generation, endpoint contracts, metrics, and no-runtime-LLM scan.

checks.name: npm run validate
checks.evidence: node --test, MDE parse check, Cranfield sample index check, and fixture evaluation all passed.

checks.name: npm run export:cranfield -- --out-dir /private/tmp/retail-search-cranfield-export --bulk /private/tmp/retail-search-cranfield-bulk.ndjson
checks.evidence: Public Glasgow Cranfield source exported 1,400 documents, 225 queries, and 1,837 qrels without credentials or deployment.

checks.name: Cloudflare read-only token/account/Workers verification
checks.evidence: A sibling .env.local Cloudflare token was active, account read access succeeded, and Workers services read access succeeded. No secret values were printed. Deploy/write scope was not proven because no mutation was approved.
